attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRT_CNT_IB_IFACE)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRT_CNT_IB_IF.MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRT_CNT_IB_IF.CARTON_CONTENT_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRT_CNT_IB_IF.CARTON_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRT_CNT_IB_IF.ORDER_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRT_CNT_IB_IF.SO_LINE_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRT_CNT_IB_IF.INVENTORY_ITEM_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRT_CNT_IB_IF.PACKOUT_QUANTITY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRT_CNT_IB_IF.PARENT_ITEM_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRT_CNT_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRT_CNT_IB_IF.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRT_CNT_IB_IF.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRT_CNT_IB_IF.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRT_CNT_IB_IF.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRT_CNT_IB_IF.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRT_CNT_IB_IF.PROCESSED_FLAG, STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRT_CNT_IB_IF.LAST_UPDATE_DATE 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRT_CNT_IB_IF STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRT_CNT_IB_IF,
 (
 select CARTON_CONTENT_ID ,CARTON_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRT_CNT_IB_IF
 minus
 select CARTON_CONTENT_ID ,CARTON_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRT_CNT_IB_IFACE
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.CARTON_CONTENT_ID = STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRT_CNT_IB_IF.CARTON_CONTENT_ID and ACM.CARTON_ID=STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRT_CNT_IB_IF.CARTON_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXSCM_MK_CRT_CNT_IB_IF.REFRESH_DATETIME
